harvestedTerms.summary: OpenAI publishes a cybersecurity action plan focused on democratizing AI-powered cyber defense, coordinating across government and industry, and preserving visibility in deployment. The article introduces framing around 'Intelligence Age' cybersecurity and structured pillars for AI-assisted defense.

OpenAI article on community safety practices for ChatGPT, covering model training for harm avoidance, automated detection systems, human review workflows, law enforcement referrals, and parental controls. Introduces concepts around behavioral pattern detection, structured risk assessment, and safety escalation pipelines.
